titleStmt.title: SII 11.65: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 65. (B.K. No. 110 of 1926-27). HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE ROOF OF THE ŚIVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva I. His subordinate Daṇḍanāyaka Vāvaṇarasa, the eldest son of Kēśavarasa, was governing the Two Six-Hundred districts and his younger brother the Mahāsāmantādhipati Śrīpādarasa, was ruling over Muḷugunda-Twelve. The object of the inscription is to record the grant of an areca-nut garden and house-sites made by Āycha-Gāvuṇḍa of Posavūr to the basadi constructed by him in memory of his wife Kaṁchikabbe while Posavūr was being administered by Sindarasa at the command of Rēvakabbarasi, the wife of Vāvaṇarasa. Sindarasa was the son of Koṟalgunda who belonged to the Sinda race and Kannula (Kunnala ?) family. The stone was set up by Polega, son of Eṟaka or Yaṟaga, who was the eldest son of Āycha-Gāvuṇḍa who belonged to the Moraka family. (On Koṟalgunda see No. 47 above).

The record is dated Śaka 950, Vibhava, Paushya, śuddha-trayōdaśī, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The date is irregular. In Vibhava, the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti occurred on Tuesday, Pushya, śu. 5, (= Dec. 24, A.D. 1028). But in the following year, Pushya, śu. 13 and Sunday coincided but the saṅkrānti occurred on the following Wednesday (= Dec. 24, A.D. 1029).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁccha
naṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
svasti srī yāpanīyasaṁghe śrīyayi ga
ṇada śrīvaratraividyadēvara śiṣya
jayasāśanaṁ .
rumādaralliṁ baḷiyaṁ Ž jaināgamābdhirjjayakīrttidēvostanmōghamukhyōjanina
candraḥ siddhāntaśabdāgamatatvavēdī rājēndracūḍāmaṇicuṁbitāṁghriḥ .For the full name see 1-46
namastasmai varāhāya līḷāyā caratē mahīṁ khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ kaṇaka
ṇāyatē Ž svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirāja para
mēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadē
kamalladēvara rājya muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācandrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdama
hāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīmatkēsavarasara tadāgra
tanūjaṁ Ž svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabda mahāsandhivigrahādhipati mahā
pracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīvāvaṇarasa reraḍaṟunūṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadi nāḷuttamire tasyānujaṁ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāma
ntādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīmat śrīpādarasa rmmuḷugunda
panneraḍuma nāḷuttumire . śrīmadvāvaṇarasa narasiya rdvitīyalakṣmī
samāneyarappa śrīmat rēvakabbarasiya rpposavūra nāḷuttumire ©
svasti śrī sindakuḷōdbhavaṁ kaṁnulavaṁśapradīpakaṁ pannagadhvajavirājamānaṁ pageva
rabhīmaṁ śrīmatkoṟalagundaṁpurassaramāge . tannandanaṁ vyāghralāṁchana
mārttaṇḍaṁ muḻugundavidyādharaṁ śrīsindarasaṁ taddharmmamaṁ pratipāḻisuttumire
© svastyanēkaguṇagaṇavipuḷadaḷavaḷayavaḷayitaṁ satyasaucācāra
cāritranayavinayarārājitasarāgapunjapiṁjaritātisaya śi
kaṇṭhikāḷaṁkritaṁ kaḻikāḷēyakaḷaṁkapaṁkarahitaṁ manumunicaritaṁ kamaḷa
madhyasthitaṁ dēvadvijagurupādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ paranārīdūraṁ vibu
dhajanādhāraṁ vinayāṁburāsi sōmēśvaradāsi satyakānīnaṁ saucāṁ
janēya nakaḷaṁkacaritaṁ sanmānadāni vivēkabṛhaspati bhayalōbhavarjjitaṁ
sakaḷaguṇasaṁpūrṇnaṁ kalikālakarṇna namaḷacaritraṁ naḍunāḍa tīrtthaṁ śrīma
tposavū rāycagāvuṇḍaṁ . dharmmavicārada guṇada tavarmmane kalikāla
dharmmataneyaṁ saucakkārmma nivanendupalaruṁ nermmuva rāycuga nidēṁ kṛtārtthano ja
gadoḷ . kramamaṟiyada dharmmavicāramanaḷidaḷipiṁge vēḷvatakkari meṁbī
kumatigaḷaṁ pesarggoḷa lakkume posavūrāyca nirdda rājitasabheyoḷ .
sārataramappa manuja rvvāridhiparyyantamēkhaḷāvanitaḷado ḷmērusamāna
ryyaṁ cāruvaca rpposavūrāyca pōlvare ninnaṁ . Ātana kulavadhu vinaya
sucāritra sakaḷajanavandite vikhyātakalikālasīte vinūta yena
cikabbe sale nile negarddaḷ . sūṇḍiya madanāgaseṭṭiya maga ḷkaṁciyabbe
yadā sīme śīḷada tavarmmane sadguṇa dirkkedāṇa mārppina kaṇi saccaritrade
ndabhimānada janmabhūmi māntanada modalviḷāsanidhi rūpina poṁpuḷi puṇyamūrttiye
nu nayadiṁde baṇnipu diḷāvaḷeyaṁ sale kaṁcikabbeyaṁ . hariharahiraṇyagarbbha
rddoreyeniparmmūvarartti yaṟagaṁ nākaṁ harisuta nannaṁ dēvaṁ morakāmnāyekke tiḷaka
rāycana putrar © svasti sakanṛpakāḷātīta saṁvatsara sataṅga 950 neya
vibhava saṁvatsaraṁ pravarttise tadvarṣābhyaṁtarada pauṣyamāsa suddhapakṣaṁ trayō
dasi Ādityavāramu muttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyandu Āycagāvuṇḍaṁ tanna peṇḍati
kaṁcikabbegāvuṇḍige parōkṣavinayaṁ basadiyaṁ māḍisi Arasuṁ nārggāvuṇḍuṁ purassara
māgi nāgacandrasiddhāntigargge kālgacci biṭṭa Aḍakeya tōṁṭaṁ . Ūriṁ baḍaga gāvuṇḍana koḍa
geydōṁṭadiṁ baḍaga . poleyama dōṁṭadiṁ paḍuva . beṭṭada tarppalakaṇiya baṭṭe
yiṁ mūḍa . mūlasthānadēvara tōṁṭadiṁ teṁka lintivu catussīme . Adarkke biṭṭa ke
yi maleparamāriyakōlō ḷnālku mattar . Ūriṁ gīśānyada paḷḷada baḍagaṇa ta
ḍiya piriya dēhārada keyi teṁkaṇasīme . mūlasthānadēvara keyi . paḍuvaṇa
sīme karggallu baḍagaṇa sīme . biḷiya kalluṁ mūḍaṇa sīme . Intivu catussī
me . basadiya teṁkaṇadeseyo ḷnālkumaneya nivēśaṇaṁ . Intī tōṁṭakkaṁ
gadyāṇa teṟuvudu śrīmadāycagāvuṇḍana māḍisida basadi gēḻu
nūrvvaru mirddu dharmmakke purassararāgi Eleyatōṁṭadoḷondu baḷḷiyuṁ Aḍakeya
tōṁṭadoḷondu maranumaṁ . dēvadīvige gokkala londu poṟeyumaṁ koṭṭar . morakaku
ḷatiḷaka neṟakana varaputraṁ polega nī mahīmaṇḍaḷadoḷ sthiramāgire sāsanamaṁ
bareyisidaṁ nelanu markkanuṁ nilvinegaṁ © na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhurddēvaśvaṁ viṣamu
cyatē viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁti dēvaśvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . bhuṁjānasya hi dēvasvaṁ ma
bhō mahīpatēḥ Ayaśassantaticchēdō vyādhirnnarakanirggamaḥ svada
harēti vasuṁdharā Continuation is built in.
Digital edition of SII 11.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
